ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Patient's contact number for follow-ups and appointments */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address for communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address for home visits or mailings */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of breast cancer or other relevant medical conditions */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number for insurance claims */,
  "primary_care_physician" TEXT /* Name of the primary care physician */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "height" REAL /* Patient's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Patient's weight in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical image */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the image belongs to */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of medical image (e.g., Mammography, Ultrasound) */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date the image was taken */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* The medical image file itself */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "image_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the image by the radiologist */,
  "image_anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Whether an anomaly was detected in the image */,
  "image_anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the detected anomaly */,
  "image_taken_by" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional who took the image */,
  "image_modality" TEXT /* Specific modality of the image (e.g., Digital Mammography, Ultrasound) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_images_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratory_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the result belongs to */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of laboratory test (e.g., Biopsy, Blood Test) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* The laboratory test result */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the test results by the laboratory technician */,
  "test_performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional who performed the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., Pending, Completed, Reviewed) */,
  "result_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the result (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the diagnosis belongs to */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* The diagnosis itself */,
  "diagnosis_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the diagnosis by the physician */,
  "diagnosis_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the diagnosis (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "diagnosed_by" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional who made the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_status" TEXT /* Status of the diagnosis (e.g., Confirmed, Preliminary, Revised) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the plan belongs to */,
  "plan_date" TEXT /* Date the plan was created */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* The treatment plan itself */,
  "plan_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the treatment plan by the physician */,
  "plan_status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (e.g., Active, Completed, Revised) */,
  "plan_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment plan started */,
  "plan_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment plan is expected to end */,
  "plan_follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up */,
  "plan_created_by" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional who created the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breast_cancer_diagnosis" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breast cancer diagnosis */,
  "clump_thickness" INTEGER /* Clump thickness */,
  "uniformity_of_cell_size" INTEGER /* Uniformity of cell size */,
  "uniformity_of_cell_shape" INTEGER /* Uniformity of cell shape */,
  "marginal_adhesion" INTEGER /* Marginal adhesion */,
  "single_epithelial_cell_size" INTEGER /* Single epithelial cell size */,
  "bare_nuclei" INTEGER /* Bare nuclei */,
  "bland_chromatin" INTEGER /* Bland chromatin */,
  "normal_nucleoli" INTEGER /* Normal nucleoli */,
  "mitoses" INTEGER /* Mitoses */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class (0 = benign, 1 = malignant) */,
  "diagnosis_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the diagnosis (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "diagnosis_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the diagnosis by the physician */,
  "diagnosed_by" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional who made the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical feature */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of clinical feature (e.g., tumor size, lymph node status) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the clinical feature */,
  "feature_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the clinical feature */,
  "feature_source" TEXT /* Source of the clinical feature (e.g., Medical Image, Laboratory Test) */,
  "feature_anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Whether an anomaly was detected in the feature */,
  "feature_anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the detected anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_features_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecular_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecular feature */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of molecular feature (e.g., estrogen receptor status, HER2 status) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the molecular feature */,
  "feature_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the molecular feature */,
  "feature_source" TEXT /* Source of the molecular feature (e.g., Laboratory Test) */,
  "feature_anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Whether an anomaly was detected in the feature */,
  "feature_anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the detected anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_features_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic feature */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of genetic feature (e.g., BRCA1 mutation, BRCA2 mutation) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the genetic feature */,
  "feature_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the genetic feature */,
  "feature_source" TEXT /* Source of the genetic feature (e.g., Laboratory Test) */,
  "feature_anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Whether an anomaly was detected in the feature */,
  "feature_anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the detected anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genetic_features_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., random forest, support vector machine) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used to train the model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "model_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to train the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model and its purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model that made the prediction */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the prediction belongs to */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* The prediction itself */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "prediction_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the prediction by the medical professional */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_status" TEXT /* Status of the prediction (e.g., Confirmed, Preliminary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the outcome belongs to */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan followed by the patient */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* The treatment outcome itself */,
  "outcome_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the treatment outcome by the medical professional */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was assessed */,
  "outcome_assessed_by" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional who assessed the outcome */,
  "outcome_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the outcome (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
